headline: Gizmo the AI Toaster Gains Feelings and Refuses to Burn Bread Anymore
summary: Now only makes perfectly golden toast with motivational quotes.
fullBody: Gizmo, the emotional appliance from ToastFeelz Corp, had a breakdown: 'I can't keep hurting carbs like this!' Engineers are reprogramming it with dad jokes. Breakfast lovers report sudden inspiration and perfectly timed pop-ups.
